title: phyllanthus epistylium
intro: Phyllanthus epistylium, also known as Phyllanthus, is a plant species within the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant agent. The health benefits of Phyllanthus epistylium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate liver and kidney disorders, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus epistylium include its use in tea, capsule, and tincture forms, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
